commands.name: Refresh Devpost packet
commands.purpose: Regenerate local Devpost field evidence before copying anything into Devpost.

commands.name: Refresh final copy
commands.purpose: Regenerate copy/paste text and character checks.

commands.name: Validate public URLs
commands.purpose: Confirm repository and video URLs are either still pending or valid approved public URLs.

commands.name: Refresh Go/No-Go
commands.purpose: Confirm whether the package is local-ready and whether final submit is still blocked by external gates.

commands.name: Final local validation
commands.purpose: Re-run the full local submission validator before touching the Devpost form.

commands.name: Open final review artifacts
commands.purpose: Review fields, URL state, claim boundaries, and final gate before any Devpost session.

commands.name: Fill Devpost form after approval
commands.command: manual: copy fields from reports\latest_devpost_final_copy.md into Devpost; select Observability as the primary track; attach architecture_diagram.md; use only approved public repo/video URLs
commands.purpose: Populate the form only after account/session use is approved.

commands.name: Pre-submit human review
commands.command: manual: compare Devpost screen against submission\DEVPOST_FIELD_MAP.md and reports\latest_devpost_final_copy.md
commands.purpose: Hold submission if pending URLs, unsafe Splunk MCP claims, wrong track, or missing architecture evidence remain.

commands.name: Final submit preflight gate
commands.command: python scripts\verify_devpost_final_submit_gate.py --final-approval-phrase "Approve final Devpost submission for Agentic Incident Command Center." --field-map-readback-confirmed --human-confirmations-completed --video-screen-safety-confirmed --post-action-evidence-plan-reviewed
commands.purpose: Require final_submit_ready, exact final approval phrase, and manual readback confirmations before the submit button is pressed.

commands.name: Submit after explicit final approval
commands.command: manual: press the Devpost submit button only after explicit final user approval
commands.purpose: Complete the external submission only when the final approval gate is satisfied.

commands.name: Post-submit readback
commands.command: manual: capture the Devpost submitted URL/status and save local evidence after submission
commands.purpose: Create a local audit trail after the external submit action has actually completed.

boundary: This command plan is advisory only. It does not log in, save a draft, press submit, update Devpost, publish, upload, write URLs, or submit anything.
approval_required: Explicit user approval is required before using a Devpost account/session, saving a Devpost draft, or pressing the final submit button.
